name: gif-selector
title: GIF Selector
description: Search Klipy and/or Giphy for GIFs and copy them directly to your clipboard
author: RealThanosP

commands.name: gif-selector
commands.title: Search GIFs
commands.subtitle: Giphy & Klipy
commands.description: Search for GIFs and copy them to your clipboard

preferences.name: provider
preferences.title: GIF Provider
preferences.description: Select whether to use Giphy or Klipy by default.

preferences.name: klipyApiKey
preferences.title: Klipy API Key
preferences.description: Your Klipy API key. Get one for free at https://klipy.com/developers

preferences.name: giphyApiKey
preferences.title: Giphy API Key
preferences.description: Your Giphy API key. Get one at https://developers.giphy.com

preferences.name: previewQuality
preferences.title: Preview Quality
preferences.description: Choose the GIF preview quality in the details panel. Lower quality loads faster.
